con:config.script:
import groovy.json.*
//def terminalIDs = testRunner.testCase.testSuite.project.testSuites['GSBet _settlement'].testCases['TerminalCreation'].testSteps['Properties'].getPropertyValue('AllTerminalIDs') def terminalIDs = ['2fe9041f-05ee-efbb-5d47-13315ed26aa7', '66051d91-18d1-1d6d-3909-ab70d4cf69c8', 'bdc7a6d7-69b4-831e-711c-b6f7c5aea099', 'f22b2f49-20bb-1d59-b2ad-07258f970102', 'bbaded30-78ae-f48d-bd26-e69a9213bf44'] log.info terminalIDs
def walletIds1 = terminalIDs as String def walletsIds2 = walletIds1.substring(1, walletIds1.length() - 1) def list = walletsIds2.tokenize(', ') log.info list
def i = testRunner.testCase.testSteps['Properties'].getPropertyValue("i") as Integer log.info i
testRunner.testCase.testSteps['Properties'].setPropertyValue("CurrentWalletId",list[i])

con:config.con:query: select * from retail.terminal where terminal_code='${terminal_code#Result}' and tenant_id='${tenantid}' --and DATE_TIME_CREATED_UTC >'2022-10-01 15:00:44.18352'

con:config.script: def token = context.expand('${Login#Response#$.token}') testRunner.testCase.testSteps['Properties'].setPropertyValue("TerminalToken",'Bearer '+token)
def franchiseName = testRunner.testCase.testSuite.project.testSuites['GSBet _settlement'].testCases['Create_Franchise'].testSteps['properties'].getPropertyValue("franchiseName") return franchiseName
def franchiseId = testRunner.testCase.testSuite.project.testSuites['GSBet _settlement'].testCases['Create_Franchise'].testSteps['properties'].getPropertyValue("franchiseId") return franchiseId

con:config.con:query: select * from configuration.configuration_group where name = 'Terminal' and tenant_id = '${tenantId}' and franchise_id = '${FranchiseId#Result}' and context = 'Sport' limit 10

con:config.script:
import groovy.time.TimeCategory
use (TimeCategory) { def now = new Date() def fromDate = now - 1.hour def toDate = now + 2.hours def nowOne = now + 1.hour log.info fromDate.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") log.info toDate.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") testRunner.testCase.testSteps["Datetime2"].setPropertyValue( "fromDate", fromDate.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["Datetime2"].setPropertyValue( "toDate", toDate.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["Datetime2"].setPropertyValue( "now", now.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["Datetime2"].setPropertyValue( "nowOne", nowOne.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") ) return fromDate.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss") }

con:restRequest.name: GetRandomEvent
con:restRequest.con:request: { "eventIds": null, "sportId": "1", "locationId": null, "leagueId": null, "phase": "Prematch", "eventType": "Standard", "startFrom": null, "startTo": null, "endFrom": null, "marketId": "1", "minOdds": null, "maxOdds": null, "betStatus": "Open", "singleBet": true, "limit": 1 }

con:config.script:
import groovy.json.*
def response = context.expand('${GetRandomEvent#Response}') def json = new JsonSlurper().parseText(response)
def randomNumber = Math.abs(new Random().nextInt() % json.size())
def event = json[randomNumber]
def eventId = event.eventId def linkedId = event.linkedId def providerId = event.providerId def marketId = event.marketId def eventMarketBetId = event.eventMarketBetId def eventMarketBetName = event.eventMarketBetName def eventMarketBetPrice = event.eventMarketBetPrice def marketName = event.marketName def eventMarketBetBaseLine = event.eventMarketBetBaseLine def isLive = event.isLive def leagueId = event.leagueId def actionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "eventId", eventId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "linkedId", eventId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "providerId", providerId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "marketId", marketId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "eventMarketBetId", eventMarketBetId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "eventMarketBetName", eventMarketBetName ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "eventMarketBetPrice", eventMarketBetPrice as String) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "marketName", marketName ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "eventMarketBetBaseLine", eventMarketBetBaseLine ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "isLive", isLive as String ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "leagueId", leagueId ) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["BetInfo"].setPropertyValue( "actionId", actionId )
return eventMarketBetPrice as Double

con:config.con:query: select * from sport.ticket where id = '${BetInfo#actionId}' and tenant_id = '${tenantId}' order by created_datetime desc

con:config.script: testRunner.gotoStepByName("CheckTicket")
def actionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString() return actionId

con:config.con:query: select * from sport.ticket where franchise_id = '69da774c-5a19-459b-b110-f197f520cbbd' and tenant_id = '${tenantId}' and status='Won' order by created_datetime desc limit 1
select * from sport.ticket where id = '${BetInfo2#actionId}' and tenant_id = '${tenantId}' and status="Won" order by created_datetime desc

con:config.script:
def actionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
return actionId

con:config.con:query: select * from sport.ticket where id = '${BetInfo2#actionId}' and tenant_id = '${tenantId}' order by created_datetime desc

select sum(case when transactiontypeid in (3) then amount when transactiontypeid in (-3) then -amount else 0 end) payin, sum(case when transactiontypeid in (4) then amount when transactiontypeid in (-4) then -amount else 0 end) payout, sum(case when transactiontypeid in (150) then amount when transaction_direction_id in (-150) then -amount end) wintax, sum(case when transactiontypeid in (146) then amount when transaction_direction_id in (-146) then -amount end) servicecharge from ewallet.transaction eat join ewallet.account ea on eat.walletid = ea.ewalletid and ea.id = eat.accountid where walletid ='${Properties#CurrentWalletId}'
select * from retail.cost_center_user where cost_center_id ='${CostCenterID#Result}' order by timestamp asc limit 1
